🚀 From Idea to MVP in Weeks

Stop building decks.
Start shipping product.

We build MVPs, mobile apps, and cloud platforms for early-stage startups — fixed price, no equity, delivered in 4-8 weeks. Direct access to senior engineers who actually build your product.

WHAT WE BUILD

The modern startup stack

📱

Mobile Apps

We build cross-platform applications using Flutter and React Native. This lets you ship to both iOS and Android simultaneously from a single codebase without sacrificing native performance, allowing you to reach users on all platforms from day one.

🌐

Web Applications

High-performance web platforms and SaaS products engineered with Next.js and React. Our web apps are SEO-friendly, blazing fast, and designed with infinite scalability in mind to handle rapid user growth without breaking.

🤖

AI Chatbots & Automation

Turn AI into an actual product feature. We integrate cutting-edge LLMs, build interactive WhatsApp bots, and automate complex workflows to give your startup an unfair technological advantage over traditional competitors.

☁️

Cloud Infrastructure

Serverless architecture deployed on Firebase, Supabase, or Cloudflare Workers. We keep your initial cloud bill close to zero while you search for product-market fit, ensuring you only pay for what you use as you scale.

INDUSTRIES

Where we excel

💸

FinTech & SaaS

Scalable web applications, subscription billing integrations, and secure data handling designed to comply with financial standards.

✓ Stripe/Razorpay Integration
✓ Data Security
✓ Subscription Logic
✓ Analytics Dashboards
🛍️

D2C & E-Commerce

High-conversion storefronts, inventory management systems, and automated fulfillment workflows tailored for direct-to-consumer brands.

✓ Headless Commerce
✓ Payment Gateways
✓ Inventory Sync
✓ Order Tracking
🏥

HealthTech & EdTech

HIPAA-compliant infrastructure, real-time video streaming, and user-centric interfaces for modern healthcare and education platforms.

✓ Video Conferencing
✓ Compliance Hardening
✓ User Profiles
✓ Booking Systems
